name: DNSimple API
description: DNSimple provides DNS hosting, domain registration, and SSL certificate management. Use this API to manage domains, DNS records, registrations, SSL certificates, contacts, and webhooks.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all accounts the authenticated user has access to.

capabilities.name: identity_whoami
capabilities.description: Retrieve details about the currently authenticated user or account.

capabilities.name: domains_list
capabilities.description: List all domains in an account with optional filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: domains_create
capabilities.description: Create a new domain and its corresponding DNS zone.

capabilities.name: domains_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of an existing domain.

capabilities.name: domains_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a domain from the account.

capabilities.name: zone_records_list
capabilities.description: List all DNS records for a zone with optional filtering by name and type.

capabilities.name: zone_records_create
capabilities.description: Create a new DNS record in a zone.

capabilities.name: zone_records_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific DNS record.

capabilities.name: zone_records_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing DNS record.

capabilities.name: zone_records_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a DNS record from a zone.

capabilities.name: registrar_check_domain
capabilities.description: Check domain availability for registration.

capabilities.name: registrar_get_prices
capabilities.description: Retrieve registration, renewal, and transfer prices for a domain.

capabilities.name: registrar_register_domain
capabilities.description: Register a domain name.

capabilities.name: registrar_renew_domain
capabilities.description: Renew an existing domain registration.

capabilities.name: registrar_transfer_domain
capabilities.description: Transfer a domain from another registrar.

capabilities.name: zones_list
capabilities.description: List all DNS zones in the account.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: List all contacts in the account.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact for domain registrations.

capabilities.name: certificates_letsencrypt_purchase
capabilities.description: Order a Let's Encrypt SSL certificate for a domain.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all registered webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Register a new webhook endpoint.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a registered webhook.

capabilities.name: dnssec_enable
capabilities.description: Enable DNSSEC for a domain.

capabilities.name: dnssec_disable
capabilities.description: Disable DNSSEC for a domain.

capabilities.name: billing_list_charges
capabilities.description: List billing charges for the account.

capabilities.name: tlds_list
capabilities.description: List all TLDs supported for registration and transfer.

capabilities.name: domain_delegation_get
capabilities.description: List the name servers a domain is delegated to.

capabilities.name: domain_delegation_update
capabilities.description: Change the name servers a domain is delegated to.

capabilities.name: email_forwards_list
capabilities.description: List email forwards for a domain.

capabilities.name: email_forwards_create
capabilities.description: Create a new email forward for a domain.

capabilities.name: email_forwards_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an email forward.
